name: Turkey Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook onion and bell pepper in the water for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until crisp-tender.
3. Stir in turkey. Cook an additional 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until no longer pink.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except the rolls).
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until hot.
6. Fill rolls with turkey mixture.
